name: Ability360
subject_line: Data: CMS health deficiency and penalty data identifies Arizona nursing
personalization_paragraph: CMS health deficiency and penalty data identifies Arizona nursing homes with repeated federal violations; the pattern is staffing failures plus enforcement actions and the data is public, but most families never see it before placing a loved one. The data file pairs the headline finding with the named-corridor breakdown, methodology, and the raw records behind it.
